description: Phase 32 scan_version_phase_alignment: engine.version 'minor' component must equal the numeric id of the last phase. Convention is 0.<N>.0 where N = last phase number (P31 ↔ 0.31.0). Missing the version bump when adding a phase leaves source_hash rotated but version stale — a state that looks like a phase landed without a stamp update. Gate: aligned == true.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_version_phase_alignment.json ] && jq -r "if .aligned == true then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_version_phase_alignment.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
